full_text:
Xiang Chong 向寵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Chong (向寵). Given control of internal military affairs. Died fighting Hanjia barbarians. Xiang Chong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Xiang Chong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
